why_this_action.problem: run.py could leave distribution_lane_latest.json and the daily marketing snapshot pointing at pre-execution lane truth even after an internal repair or follow-through changed what the next truthful lane actually was
why_this_action.risk: the always-on loop could reuse stale lane state, misread the execution board, and spend the next slot on fake progress or the wrong repair family

result.summary: Patched the marketing loop to refresh post-execution lane truth without emitting duplicate lane-switch logs, and to persist that refreshed truth into the daily marketing snapshot.

replacement_condition: If post-execution truth still drifts from the latest board after future runs, escalate from snapshot refresh into a dedicated stale-truth verifier for run.py outputs.
